text: On the strategic front, NVIDIA recently entered multiyear, nonexclusive agreements to invest US$2 billion each in Coherent and Lumentum, alongside multibillion-dollar purchase commitments and future capacity rights. This move suggests NVIDIA may be quietly redefining its moat by pre-buying advanced optics capacity, which could be critical for AI chip production and data center infrastructure.
